name: pr_cep_c_del_churn_exists
_finding: CLASS 3 PORTED (D-138): external delete of the sole exists EVENT witness + same-epoch reinsert re-fires (NE NE) — an explicit event-exists delete is evaluated at DELETE-TIME (arrival order) in delete_fact so the reinsert's stream-flush re-blocks+re-fires. engine==oracle.
drl: rule NE when exists E0() P() then end
